# Coral Reef Background Image

## How to add the image

1. Save the coral reef image you provided as `coral-reef-bg.jpg` in this `/public` folder
2. The image will automatically be displayed in the swarm visualization screen
3. The image shows at 80% opacity as background

## Image specifications

- **Filename**: `coral-reef-bg.jpg` (exactly this name)
- **Location**: `/public/coral-reef-bg.jpg`
- **Color zones** (left to right):
  - Blue zone (left) - Openness
  - Red zone - Conscientiousness
  - Yellow zone (center) - Extraversion
  - Purple/Lila zone - Agreeableness
  - Green zone (right) - Neuroticism

The coral reefs in the visualization are positioned horizontally according to these color zones.
